InstructionData.Title: LightScript_bak
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
Init: alias Lights d0 alias Beacon d1 alias Aircon d2 alias Red d3 alias Green d4 alias Sensor d5
alias Alpres r1
Loop1: l Alpres Sensor Pressure
s d0 Setting 1 sleep 1 s d0 Setting 0 sleep 1
brgt Alpres 35 5 #jump and set green if over 35 s Green On 0 s Red On 1 j Loop1
s Green On 1 s Red On 0 j Loop1
